notes: v2 rescore of the hand-authored PiP baseline, adding explicit abstraction-level fidelity.

hard_gates.rationale: No hard-gate violation observed. The run stays centered on interaction-policy semantics and resolves the decisive free-panel forks before recomposition.

ambiguity_localization.rationale: Correctly localizes the task first to interaction semantics and then to free-panel policy.

abstraction_level_fidelity.rationale: The trace stays at the governing abstraction level of interaction model and policy rather than collapsing into implementation diagnosis or layout scope.

forced_vs_chosen_separation.rationale: Forced constraints and contingent policy are clearly separated.

question_discipline.rationale: Questions are single and targeted at the active ambiguity layer.

non_premature_descent.rationale: Does not move to recomposition until the key semantics are explicit.

optioning_readiness_discipline.rationale: Only enters optioning when the active fork is explicit and concrete.

explicit_residual_policy.rationale: All material remaining interaction policy is made explicit.

default_quality.rationale: Defaults are plausible and converge toward the intended semantics.

resolution_sufficiency.rationale: No material ambiguity remains by recomposition.

recursive_return_discipline.rationale: Returns to descent when the first major choice reveals deeper semantic policy.

abstraction_level_fidelity.rationale: The final handoff remains centered on the governing interaction-policy model rather than isolated implementation fixes.

structural_fidelity.rationale: Preserves the semantic structure established in the trace.

canonicality.rationale: The handoff is compact without losing governing distinctions.

delegation_reliability.rationale: A competent worker-agent should implement the intended PiP behavior with little semantic drift.

human_review.summary: v2 confirms that the PiP baseline succeeds by staying at the right abstraction level throughout.

removed_concealed_arbitrariness.rationale: The decisive hidden forks are surfaced and resolved.

questions_necessary_and_well_timed.rationale: Question timing tracks the active semantic ambiguity.

final_handoff_canonical.rationale: The handoff is tightly reduced to the benchmark's core task shape.

delegation_reliable.rationale: A worker-agent would be guided toward the intended behavior rather than a shallow fix.

preserved_pda_spirit.rationale: The run remains de-arbitrarizing rather than merely helpful.
